author: Kapylosh
text:
I had a great experience with Nick from Prompt Recovery. From the very first call, he was professional, calm, and extremely responsive. He clearly explained the situation, gave me an accurate arrival time, and kept me updated along the way.

When he arrived, he handled everything efficiently and with care. You can immediately tell he knows what he’s doing. He made a stressful situation much easier to deal with, which is exactly what you need when you’re stuck with car trouble. His attitude was friendly, reassuring, and genuinely helpful.

The service was quick, reliable, and fairly priced, with no hidden costs or surprises. It’s rare to find someone so dependable and customer-focused.

I highly recommend Nick and Prompt Recovery to anyone in need of roadside assistance. Truly top-class service. Best Price!!!

author: Benny Balika
text: Excellent service! Prompt Recovery delivered my Mazda today, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. Everything was handled professionally, the delivery was right on time, and my car arrived in perfect condition. The team was friendly, reliable, and easy to communicate with. I highly recommend Prompt Recovery to anyone who needs safe and dependable vehicle transport.

author: James White
text:
OMG! I was stuck with a flat tyre 35 miles from home! Couldn’t take tyre off to change!!
I rang unknown recovery man as I didn’t have any insurance related help!
An angel appeared 20 minutes after call!
‘Nick’, the most polite/helpful man you could ever meet!
Put car on trailer after trying to change spare wheel but it was flat!!
So, we jumped into his lorry-loader with car on back. Brought me home with car!
Fantastic service at a brilliant price .
Thank you
Please call him if ever you need!

author: Porcariu Alexandru
text:
Nick from Prompt Recovery came to the rescue when I really needed it. Even though he was quite far away, he showed up surprisingly fast. His price was honestly unbeatable compared to all the other quotes I got in that stressful moment. Serious, down-to-earth, full of common sense and 100% professional.

In a sea full of sharks, Nick is genuinely trustworthy. Highly recommend!

author: Andy Goppy
text: Excellent customer service by Nick. Arrived within 30 minutes of my call. Very polite and professional.  Carefully recovered my car and delivered to a local garage without fuss. Even dropped me to my local train station! Definitely recommend him !

author: Max Bateman
text:
Nick was professional, prompt and extremely reasonably priced.

Especially when I was in dire straights when the RAC couldn’t repair my car on the roadside.

Nick was very quick in picking up my enfeebled car and dropping us home. Will definitely recommend his services to anyone in need.  And will gladly use him again should I need to.

Thanks Nick!

author: N& D
text: I can’t recommend Prompt Recovery enough! I was thoroughly impressed by the level of professionalism and efficiency they provided. The driver arrived quickly, was professional and friendly, and clearly knew exactly what he was doing. It’s clear that they take great pride in their work and genuinely care about their customers. I wouldn’t hesitate to call them again or recommend them to anyone in need of roadside assistance!

author: Ionut Manescu
text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Professional and efficient service.
The vehicle recovery was carried out promptly and to a high professional standard. The operator arrived on time, secured the vehicle correctly, and transported it safely without any issues. Clear communication throughout the process and transparent pricing. A reliable roadside assistance service that I would confidently recommend.

author: Steven Pullen
text: Nick was fantastic , this is the first time I have needed a breakdown recovery so I had no clue what to do and he explained very clearly and friendly. He arrived just 10 minutes after I called him and he was the definition of professional while also remaining friendly. Would definitely recommend and he kept the cost much lower than I thought it would be.

author: Sue
text: Great service from start to finish. From the initial phone call, to receiving the quote,  to be kept updated with the time frame and to my car being towed.  Would highly recommend.  Thank you Nick.

author: Arafat Ali
text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

I recently had the pleasure of using Prompt Recovery Ltd, and I can't praise them enough! From the moment I called, their response was incredibly quick and reassuring, I received a call back confirming that help was on the way. Prices are very affordable as well!

The team arrived promptly, well within the estimated time frame, which alleviated my stress significantly. Their technicians were not only skilled but also exceptionally courteous. They explained the process clearly and addressed all my concerns, making me feel like I was in great hands.

Overall, I highly recommend Prompt Recovery Ltd for their outstanding service, rapid response, and professionalism.

author: Mikalia Blake
text:
My car got stuck in the grass and I couldn’t get it out. I called Prompt Recovery, and Nick truly came to the rescue! From the end of our phone call, he was with me in just 20 minutes. He was professional, friendly, and quickly got my car out of the mud with no trouble at all.
I really appreciate the fast response and excellent service. Highly recommend!

author: Nerrow Qwerty
text:
I am so glad I've got to meet Nick.
He was recommended to me and It ended up to be the best recommendation ever.
He was very prompt, punctual, professional and happy to help me out with the recovery.
On top of all, his price was unmatched by other competitors.
Overall, he turned my bad day into a good one. Very grateful for meeting him.

author: Reza Vaziri
text: I arranged with Nick to recover a car for me, his communication was excellent and extremely punctual at the location, messaging me the night before to reassure me, his service was excellent and very polite. I would highly recommend him. Superb from start to finish. 👍👍👍👍 …

author: Rusu Viorel
text:
I cannot thank Nick enough for the incredible service.
My van broke down near Heathrow, which is one of the worst places to be stranded, and I was honestly very stressed. I called Nick and from the first minute he was calm, professional and reassuring. He told me he would arrive within 45 minutes — and he did exactly that..
He gave me a very fair price upfront over the phone, with complete transparency. No hidden costs, no last-minute surprises.
My Ford Transit Custom is a heavy van, but his 7-ton recovery truck handled it perfectly. You could immediately see he has the right equipment and real experience with larger vehicles.
He turned a very stressful situation into a smooth and professional experience. Reliable, honest and genuinely helpful.
I highly recommend Nick to anyone who needs recovery, especially around Heathrow. 10/10 service.

author: emi jes
text: Nick really came through for us in a pinch! He was true to his name, ‘prompt’, and he went about his work with care, urgency and excellence. It also helps that he is very personable and easy to get along with! I can’t recommend him enough!

author: michal nowak
text:
Highly recommended Recovery Company based in Watford.
Very kind and helpful driver/owner of Prompt Recovery , that responded quick and and turned up at scene quicker than expected.
🙏 Really appreciated and I will definately recommend  to others 🙂 …

author: L K
text:
My car had recently broken down not far from my home in Watford on busy road which has caused me a distress. I contacted Nick at Prompt Recovery asking if he would assist me in towing my car to the garage in Apsley Hemel Hampstead.

I honestly couldn’t ask for a better service. Nick has met me outside of working hours, provided his assessment of the issue, checked car battery and finally transferred the car onto his van, kept my vehicle overnight and picked me up in the morning to drop me to the garage and back home.

I was not only very impressed with Nick’s friendly attitude which definitely made the whole experience more bearable but also his equipment, tools and skills in which he performed loading and offloading of the vehicle, which he was even complemented on by garage’s staff.

The price was also very reasonable comparing to other quotes that I have received.

Overall I would like to highly recommend his services and thank you for helping me in difficult situation.

author: Theo Goodman
text:
Rescued me off the side of the M25 at nearly midnight. No fuss, got the car loaded up then drove me back home.
Very reasonable pricing for the job, picked up the phone almost instantly, compared to being on hold for nearly half an hour when I tired the aa before Nick.
Just a very genuine dude, looking to help out those who need his services without charging a fortune like many other recovery companies. Defo recommend Nick over any other recovery companies I tried contacting when my car broke down

author: Terry Green
text:
I contacted Nick from Prompt Recovery as I needed a car moving to a location with a driveway to give me time to fix it. After making a few calls to local companies i was given quite high prices. I then contacted nick & his price was near half what the others quoted. He also said he could do it that night within a few hours. He kept me informed, was very polite & he arrived at the time he gave me. His vehicle was perfect for the job & as it was a rool off bed so the car was put exactly on the drive where I wanted it.  Prompt Recovery by name, Prompt Recovery by nature.
Thankyou Nick.

author: Ontzy Uta
text:
Excellent service .
Nick from prompt recovery arrived in 15 minutes
He was very nice and helpful
The best price in the area
I would highly recommend his service.

author: Mihaela Nistor
text: Very impressed with the fast and reliable service we received from Prompt Recovery. They have simple and easy website to use, with very competitive price. Unfortunately we broke down and Prompt Recovery rescued us. Nick was very pleasant and helpful. Cannot recommend him or this service enough. He kept us informed of what was happening and about timings. They are at least half the price of competitors it's a no brainer to choose them.

author: Valerie-Leigh Strachan
text: Nick from Prompt Recovery Ltd provided a fantastic service to get our car recovered from Bushey Heath to St Albans. He quoted  a very reasonable fee,was on time & nothing was too much trouble. He is a charming person. We strongly recommend him for a quick & professional vehicle recovery.

author: Yaver Abbas
text: Nick is a legend, he did a job others rejected and did it well. Very well priced and knows what he is doing. Nick is your go to guy for recovery related jobs.

author: Leonardo Ferreira
text: Extremely rapid service. Nick was able to collect and load up our truck within 30mins of calling. Would definitely recommend using.

author: Stoyan Tunchev
text: Today I had break down with my van and I need it a quick recovery from A21 smart motorway to London area. My friend recommended to me "Prompt Recovery" Nick was very friendly and kind person,responded very quickly and the recovery track arrived less than the time was given to me,and needed to change the direction in the last minute of the journey and again Nick was so professional and dropped the van in the garage before the deadline. In my case he saved me next day going to the garage in opening hours. Highly recommend "Prompt Recovery"

author: Samuel Marcu
text: Nick was very professional and a great help in recovering my car. Knew what he was doing and was more than happy to go the extra mile. Strongly recommend to anyone in need of recovery. Great service and support all throughout!

author: Mihaela Farcas
text: Great recovery service — quick to arrive and very easy to deal with. The whole process was smooth, professional, and stress-free. Would definitely recommend if you need reliable roadside assistance.

author: Dorin-Liviu Vatamanu
text: Excellent service. The van broke down in central London and the recovery arrived within an hour. Very polite, on time, and respectful throughout. The price was exactly as agreed with no surprises. Highly recommended.

author: Rajesh Alluri
text: Awesome service! Prompt Recovery showed up fast in snowy and slippery conditions  and got my car sorted without any stress. Super chill, super reliable.

author: Edutravelstheglobe garcia
text:
Recently had a Jaguar recovered by Nick @ Prompt recovery. Such a smooth and speedy experience.Nick is extremely knowledgeable as well as coming across as a genuine person, which is direly rare these days, as well as offering honest and sensible pricing.

If you're after what the name itself represents (Prompt Recover)be assured and give Nick a call ,you won't be disappointed.

author: Keep it Love
text:
Fantastic experience with 'Prompt Recovery'. Not only did they offer me the most competitive price compared to the other companies that I called, the driver was also friendly and courteous throughout.

He arrived promptly, and transported my car safely to my designated garage.
A very professional service. Highly recommend.

Hopefully I won't need a recovery service again in the future but if I did, I would certainly choose Prompt Recovery.
Thank you Nick!

author: Cristi Calota
text:
Nick was very friendly and professional.
It was with me in 20 minutes after I called.
Very happy with the recovery service.
Highly recommend.
Thank you Prompt Recovery

author: Mister
text: I called Prompt recovery and spoke to Nick after breaking down on the motorway and he gave me an ETA of 15 minutes & a quote for recovery to my home address. Once more I called Nick to transport my car to a garage for work & even dropped me home for a great price. Both times were 11/10, Nick is courteous, polite, genuinely cares & wants to help. A true gent. I'm VERY skeptical when using any service but not this time. I highly recommend Prompt recovery.

author: Marianne Stapleton
text: Nick rescued me from the side of the M25 - he was fantastic! Arrived in 15 minutes as promised and delivered us home safely. Very happy to recommend.

author: Mash Sheikh
text: My van broke down and Nick from Prompt Recovery arrived quickly and handled the towing professionally. Great price, reliable roadside assistance, and excellent customer service. If you need vehicle recovery or a tow van, I highly recommend Prompt Recovery!

author: Neculai Tarniceriu
text: Fast, reliable, professional and indeed prompt. Has all the kit required for a safe recovery. Will always be my go to recovery company. Highly recommend.

author: David Riley
text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Prompt Tow Truck Recovery is simply the best—fast, friendly, and fairly priced. They showed up quickly, handled everything smoothly, and made a bad day feel a whole lot better. Highly recommend!

author: Stay Safe
text: I was recommended this recovery service by my garage.  Nick was so polite and professional.  He gave me a timeframe followed by an exact time to pick up my car.  He also sent me a text 30 minutes before he arrived and turned up when he said he would -  promptly (just like the name of his business)!  I would highly recommend his services to friends and family.  He is also good value for money!

author: Apinash Selvakkumar
text: Nick from Prompt Recovery provided a great service to get my car recovered to East London from Watford. He was on time, provided updates to make sure I knew what was going on and also quoted me very reasonable rates. Would recommend for a quick and professional recovery service. 10/10

author: Zak Jackson
text: Excellent service. Nick arrived quickly, charged the agreed price which was very reasonable and was very fast and professional

author: Cristinel Orban
text:
Our company van broke down recently and called Prompt Recovery who came to help. Driver showed up right on time and took really good care of the van while loading and unloading it at the garage. Super friendly, professional, and made a stressful situation much easier.

Really happy with the service – would definitely recommend!

author: David Spalding
text: Nick at prompt recovery was polite, friendly and helpful. Emergency recovery from the M1 was needed. Nick offered a quick, punctual response, all round professional service. Would highly recommend

author: majid hosseinzadeh
text: I had several jobs done with PROMPT Recovery, and I have to say they did an excellent job. Their pricing was very fair, and they were extremely punctual. The driver was highly professional and handled my 7.5-ton vehicle without a single scratch or damage. Plus, he was incredibly friendly and approachable. I absolutely recommend them to anyone who needs recovery services

author: Dan W
text: Stranded on the M1 miles from home. Nick was there in about 20 minutes, friendly, reliable, and got me straight to my front door. Top service, highly recommended.

author: Glynis Hammond
text: Was thrilled to find Nick ,I needed a tow truck  emergency and I found Nick. He was on time ,very professional, helpful and affordable. His prices are great.

author: Vasile Dumbraveanu
text: Nik is a very nice gentleman, definitely knows his job and he was punctual (which is very important nowadays). I recommend using his services.

author: Michael Lawson
text: Brilliant service ,very happy with price and efficiency at picking up my car at short notice ,very professional would recommend ,Excellent service will be using again ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

author: Dianna
text: Great service, Nick arrived within an hour and safely recovered my car, and transported us home even out of the Watford area. He was kind and professional. Many thanks for your speedy service.

author: Charlotte Pritchard
text: Brilliant service. We broke down 40 minutes from home, called prompt recovery and arrived with us within 10 minutes. Got our car, myself and my 2 year old home safely. Thank you very much.

author: Aslam Mugurel
text: Nick answered my call straight away! And prompt he was ! Dealt with my car in a professional manner and all at a very decent price! Thanks Nick!

author: Ludele Lacatis
text: I had a great experience with this Prompt Recovery . The team was professional, quick to respond, and handled the situation efficiently. They made a stressful moment much easier and kept me informed throughout the process. I highly recommend their service.

author: M Saf
text: Nick was referred to me, and was able to recover me from me a rural area in Oxfordshire, which might I add, (wasn’t in the best places to break down). He was extremely pleasant, and did everything in a timely manner. Leaving out as soon as he stated he would. He was also extremely competitive with pricing. Would no doubt recommend him to anyone. Many thanks again!

author: dan dragu
text:
Excellent Car Transport Service!
I recently used Prompt Recovery  to transport my vehicle, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. The booking process was smooth and straightforward, and the communication was clear from start to finish. The driver arrived on time, handled the car with care, and delivered it exactly as promised. Everything went according to plan, and my car arrived in perfect condition. Highly recommended for anyone looking for reliable and professional auto transport!

author: oskar ziolkowski
text: My van broke down on the A1M. Nick came out very quick within half an hour. Was very polite and helpful.

Janice

Great service! Best recovery in the Herts area!

author: Joshua McDermott

Very satisfied with the service . Attended within a very short time . Collection and delivery went smoothly between Tadley and Watford . Friendly service , good communication. Updates about  ETA
Five star

author: Аліна Максакова

author: Ana Claudia Negrea
text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Outstanding Vehicle Recovery Service!
I couldn’t be more impressed with the service I received from Prompt Recovery. From the moment I called, the team was professional, polite, and genuinely helpful. They arrived on time, kept me informed throughout the process, and handled my car with the utmost care and attention.

What really stood out was how understanding and reassuring they were during a stressful situation — it truly made a difference. Their pricing was very fair, and there were no hidden costs or surprises.

If you ever find yourself stuck on the road and need reliable help, I highly recommend Prompt Recovery. They go above and beyond to make sure you feel safe, supported, and back on the road as soon as possible. A five-star service all the way!

author: Tommy O'Callaghan
text: Very polite and helpful, broke down and called recovery, was with us with 30 minutes very professional service, would highly recommend using them.

text: My van tipper broke down unexpectedly, and I contacted them in a moment of frustration. They responded promptly—within ten minutes—demonstrating understanding and professionalism. They were polite and efficient when loading my items, which really eased my stress. Additionally, they offered very reasonable transportation prices; I will definitely rely on their services again in the future.

I highly recommend Nicu and his recovery company!

author: Yvonne everest
text: After my van hit a deer and no other recovery company could assist, I contacted Nick, who was more than happy to help. His quick response and excellent customer service were greatly appreciated. I’ll definitely use his services again in the future.

He delivered my car to it's destination, it was in a worse state than I had thought. He jump started it and delivered it at no extra cost even.
I can not thank him enough.

author: George Bond
text: Awesome service, showed up in under 10 minutes and recovered our tipper safely and promptly. Highly recommended

The journey to the garage was pleasant with a nice chat with Nik who was very friendly. If I ever need recovery again I wouldn’t hesitate to contact Prompt Recovery.

text: One of the best by far recovery service and since I had my first interaction with the man, I have helped a couple of friends too. I hope no one gets into unexpected but if ever ,You are stranded !!!Prompt Recovery should be your go to help line.  I strongly recommend them.👌 My vehicle attached pic, had nothing going but He managed to rescue me I am grateful 🙏

author: Rony Chandaria
text: Nick is friendly and helpful and arrived promptly . He managed to jump start my car very quickly. I would definitely recommend him, his company, and his excellent services to anyone who needs to get back on the road.

text: Excellent service, our car broke down on our way to the airport,my husband called Nick and  in 1 hour he was already with us. We highly recommend him if you are unlucky.

text: I had broken down on a narrow road in the countryside with my child in the car. Nick arrived promptly, transferred the car onto his vehicle and swiftly got us to a garage. I would highly recommend Nick at Prompt Recovery.

author: Buju TM
text:
I had a great experience with Prompt recovery company. My van broke down in St Albans, and they responded quickly and professionally. From the moment I called, they were helpful, reassuring, and kept me informed throughout the process.

The driver arrived promptly, handled my vehicle with care, and safely transported it all the way back to my home without any issues. The whole process was smooth and stress-free, which made a difficult situation much easier to deal with.

I really appreciated their reliability, efficiency, and friendly service. I would definitely recommend them to anyone needing vehicle recovery and wouldn’t hesitate to use them again in the future.

author: Alex Deleu
text:
My car had a problem today and needed recovery, Nick was just a call away and arrived in really short time, everything went smooth loading the car on the recovery lorry, even he put some extra ramps for low cars so it wouldn't scratch under the bumper, 100% recommended.
Thanks again Nick!

Thanks to their efforts, I was able to achieve a successful outcome, and I truly appreciate their support. I would highly recommend their services to anyone in need of a reliable and trustworthy recovery company. Thank you so much !

author: David Huskinson
text: Nick is Watford’s Knight in Shining Armour……we had a disaster when suspension collapsed on our van, rendering it unmovable from the road. We found his number on Google he answered quickly and got to us in under 20 minutes was extremely helpful took all the stress away and dealt with a very awkward and tricky situation. Considering the short notice and how difficult the recovery was his rates are exceptionally reasonable I cannot complain at all and I hope to use your service again thanks once again for being so helpful in such a stressful situation.

A reliable service that I will definitely use again. Thank you for your help! 🚛👏
